title: Welcome to my new blog!
summary: This is my very first blog post on the new static site.
content:
# Welcome to my Blog!

I'm so excited to share my thoughts here. This blog is built using **HTML, CSS, and JS**, and hosted on *GitHub Pages*.

## Why this stack?
- Blazing fast ⚡
- Zero backend to maintain
- Write posts in Markdown

Stay tuned for more updates!

title: My journey into Web Development
summary: A short reflection on learning modern web technologies.
content:
# The Journey Begins

Learning web development has been a fantastic experience. From understanding the core structure of HTML to styling with CSS and adding interactivity with JavaScript.

### Favorite Tools
1. VS Code
2. Git & GitHub
3. Chrome DevTools

Here is a simple code snippet I love:

```javascript
console.log('Hello, World!');
```
